missingness: No wet-lab endpoint is available in this synthetic fixture; dose and time are represented only as declared metadata status.
revision_reason: Prior discovery-memory gates did not separately protect virtual-cell perturbation claims from reconstruction-only scoring or semantic metadata drift.
falsification_route: Reject this gate if curator review shows that packets passing it still routinely promote reconstruction-only virtual-cell predictions into mechanism, cure, clinical, or veterinary claims.
next_executable_action: Run the validator against valid and invalid fixtures, then require this packet shape for virtual-cell memory promotion.

semantic_harmonization.ontology_or_mapping: cell ontology style label plus synthetic perturbation metadata map

metrics.metric_notes: The packet requires perturbation-effect and ontology-grounded metrics, not only expression reconstruction loss.

blocked_inferences: Do not infer a clinical treatment effect from this packet.
Do not infer a veterinary treatment effect from this packet.
Do not infer cure, diagnosis, or individual-level actionability.
